text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: non-infectious

text: I haven't been sleeping great and feel a bit run-down.
label: migraine/discharge

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 3 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. My heart feels a little fast.
label: influenza/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 3 day(s), and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: influenza/mild

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 3 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. My heart feels a little fast.
label: influenza/mild

text: I couldn't sleep worrying about how I've been feeling lately.
label: gastroenteritis/discharge

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 4 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s), and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 4 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Terrible. Persistent high fever, severe body aches, dry cough, drenched in sweat. 5 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 9 day(s) and getting worse, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 7 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 5 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Worst flu I've ever had. Bedridden, can't eat, spiking temperatures, every muscle hurts. 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in, though I notice it's not improving.
label: influenza/mild

text: My breathing is really laboured. Chest pain, high fever, can't stop coughing up phlegm. 9 day(s), deteriorating, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 8 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 10 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate
